# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Build stage
FROM golang:1.9 AS builder
RUN go get -d -v github.com/srihari-humbarao/todo-service
RUN cd /go/src/github.com/srihari-humbarao/todo-service \
  && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags "-w" -a .

# Final stage
FROM alpine:latest
RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates
WORKDIR /root/
COPY --from=builder /go/src/github.com/srihari-humbarao/todo-service/todo-service todo-service
EXPOSE 3014
CMD ["./todo-service"]
